nasb.text: so that they may not teach you to do according to all their detestable things which they have done for their gods, so that you would sin against the Lord your God.

esv.text: that they may not teach you to do according to all their abominable practices that they have done for their gods, and so you sin against the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 免得他們教導你們學習一切可憎的事，就是他們對自己的神所行的事，以致你們得罪耶和華你們的　神。

ccb.text: 免得他们将祭拜自己神明的可憎习俗传给你们，以致你们得罪你们的上帝耶和华。
